title: Extra Select 3 Colour Animal Figure Dog Treat Biscuits in a 1ltr Bucket (approx 130 biscuits) (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Tasty Dog Treat Biscuits: For those who crave dog treats, these are crunchy and meaty for all ages. Perfect from puppy training treats to dog bedtime biscuits!
Variety Tub: In three colours and plenty of dog biscuits shapes helps delight and engage hungry pets, perfect for training!
Every Size Welcome: They're perfect dog treats for small dogs, but bigger dogs will love them too: from puppies to senior dog treats.
Feed Responsibly: Complementary dog biscuits and treats, balance fun and nutrition for a healthy diet. Small dogs 2-4 per day. Medium: 5-7. And as dog treats for large dogs? They can have 8-10!
Resealable Tub: Keep these small dog biscuits treats fresh and tasty in this resealable bucket. Ensure they enjoy their Extra Select Dog Treats every single time.
description: Indications Crude Protein 7.8% - Crude Fat 7.9% - Crude Ash 1.3% - Crude Fibre 2.8% - Sodium 0.3% Ingredients Cereals, glucose 18.8%, palm oil, minerals. Additives-caramel: E-10d, milk-aroma, butter-aroma, yellow: E-102. Technological additives: acidity-regulator: E-272 Directions Feeding Guide - Small Dog: 2-4, Medium Dog: 5-7, Large Dog: 8-10. To be given as a reward alongside your daily feeding routine. The guidelines are an approximate daily requirement for an adult dog. Remember, your dog's appetite will vary according to lifestyle, age, and condition so you may need to adjust the quantities accordingly. Always provide a supply of fresh drinking water and always feed under supervision. This product contains traces of nutes, not fit for human consumption. See more
